creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 226212
textproc/kepubify: update to 4.0.0

Update textproc/kepubify to 4.0.0 and adjusts dependencies.

As requested by upstream, -tags zip117 is now supplied to apply a backported patch from the upcoming Go 1.17 release.

Tested with Poudriere on arm64 13.0-RELEASE.
